steps.stepDescription: Talk to King Narnode Shareen in the Grand Tree(Make sure to have two empty inventory slots to start the quest).
Go up to Hazelmere, on the island east of Yanille. Fairy ring CLS or minigame teleport near Yanille.
Talk to Hazelmere.
Return to King Narnode in the Grand Tree.
Go up to Glough in the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
Talk to Glough.
Talk to King Narnode again in the Grand Tree.
Talk to Charlie on the top floor of the Grand Tree.
Return to Glough's house and search the cupboard for Glough's Journal.
Confront Glough about his journal.
Talk to Charlie.
Talk to King Narnode outside Charlie's cell.
Travel with the glider to escape.
Enter the shipyard on Karamja.
Get the Lumber order from the Foreman on the southern docks. You can either kill him or talk to him.
Return to Charlie. If entering the Stronghold through the south entrance you'll need to talk to Femi there. If you didn't help them previously you'll need to pay them 1k.
Talk to Anita in her house west of the Grand Tree.
Search the chest in Glough's house.
Take the invasion plans to King Narnode in the Grand Tree.
Place the twigs to spell 'TUZO' in the watchtower in Glough's house. Return to King Narnode if you lost any.
Go down the trap door. Be prepared for the fight against a Black Demon (level 172).
Kill the black Demon. You can safespot from where Glough stands.
Talk to King Narnode deeper in the cave.
Search the roots under the Grand Tree until you find the Daconia stone. If you lose the rock, it will be in the same root again.
Give the Daconia stone to King Narnode under the Grand Tree.
